github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: You MUST strictly follow the Conventional Commits format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>
The <type> MUST be exactly one of: feat, fix, perf, refactor, docs, test, style, build, ci, chore, revert.

The <scope> is MANDATORY. You cannot leave it empty. It MUST be exactly one of: actions, app, components, constants, i18n, lib, providers, queries, schemas, stores, utils, api, messages, config, ci, deps, repo, docs, tests.
The <subject> MUST be completely in lower-case letters.
The <subject> MUST NOT end with a period or full-stop.
Do NOT wrap the output in markdown code blocks. Output only the raw text.
